experiment_set_name.description: Unique descriptive name of a set of samples to be analyzed together. Note on Data Catalog, this can be entered when the expeirment set is created.

experiment_subcategory.description: A term (or phrase) to describe the experiment type more specifically. Free text. (e.g. gene over-expression, gene deletion, oxidative stress response)

experimenter_name.description: Enter the name(s) of the experimenters primarily responsible for the sample. Note on Data Catalog, this will be recorded by whomever creates the experiment set.

growth_medium.description: The base growth medium for the culture. Vocabulary is controlled.

growth_method.description: Growth method used for the culture. Vocabulary is controlled.

growth_stage.description: The stage of growth for the culture when the sample was taken. Vocabulary is controlled.

growth_temperature.description: Growth temperature used for the culture, in degrees C.

harvest_method.description: How was the culture sample was harvested (e.g. spin and flash freeze pellet in liquid nitrogen)

lab.description: Indicate the lab were the experiment primarily resides. Vocabulary is controlled. Note on Data Catalog, this will be recorded based on whomever creates the experiment set.

length_of_growth_until_collection.description: Time or number of doublings of the culture. Please indicate units.

library_made_by.description: The person or sequencing center who prepared the sequencing library

library_prep_protocol.description: Protocol used for preparing the sequencing libarary. Reference an PDF uploaded to Data Catalog Expierment or Freely and Easily Available Online

library_strandedness.description: The stradedness of the sequencing library. Vocabulary is controlled.

material_collected_by.description: The person who isolated the material used for sequencing.

material_source.description: The lab in which the strain is primarily located to assist in finding the strain for future use. Vocabulary is controlled.

material_source_protocol_id.description: Protocol used for isolation of the material. Reference an PDF uploaded to Data Catalog Expierment or Freely and Easily Available Online

material_type_RIP.description: The material isolated and used for sequencing. Vocabulary is controlled.

media_selection_drug.description: The drug added to the growth medium for selection. Select NONE if no drug is used. Vocabulary is controlled.

multiplex_adapter.description: Sequence of the (hexamer) multiplex adapter used for this library if multiplexing.

nitrogen_source.description: The nitrogen source present in the growth medium for the culture. Vocabulary is controlled.

organism.description: The source organism of the biological sample. Vocabulary is controlled.

other_culture_additive.description: Any other information about the culture or growth media that is important to understand the sample and the experiment (e.g. other additives, other carbon sources, other nitrogen sources).

other_growth_information.description: Indicate any additional information related to growth or collection of culture (e.g. grown in front of light box)

other_library_information.description: Include any additional information on the construction of the library or sequencing parameters

other_starting_inoculum.description: Indicate other starting inoculum information needed to undertand the experiment.

oxygen_availability.description: Oxygen availability for the culture during growth. Vocabulary is controlled.

replicate_number.description: Indicate the number of the replicate sample. Number required.

replicate_type.description: Indicate if the samples is a biological or technical replicate. Vocabulary is controlled.

run_id.description: Sequencing facility run ID for reference

sample_name.description: A short, unique name for the sample.

sequencing_center.description: The facility where the sequencing was perfomred. Vocabulary is controlled.

sequencing_platform.description: Instrument used to sequence the library. Vocabulary is controlled.

sequencing_run_type.description: Indicate if the sequencing is single end (1x) or paired end (2x) and the read length. Vocabulary is controlled.

starting_inoculum.description: Starting inoculum type for the culture. Vocabulary is controlled.

stock_number.description: The stock number of the strain (or culture or cultivar) of the organism that is the source of the biological sample (e.g. RL438 or APG4293). If no stock number available, please put NONE and update later.

strain_genotype.description: Strain genotype that reflects the history of the strain (e.g. K-12 MG1655 delta-FNR)

strain_name.description: The name of the strain of the organism that is the source of the biological sample in a human readable format (e.g. E coli WT or E coli FNR deletion)

additional_experimental_details.description: Include any additional information on the experimental design that is important for understanding the experiment (e.g. concentration of added amino acids).

additional_replicate_information.description: Include any important information on the nature of the sample in terms of replication status (e.g. what makes it a techincal replicate)

carbon_source.description: The carbon source present in the growth medium for the culture. Vocabulary is controlled.

culture_density.description: Density of the culture at collection, in OD600, Klett units, or CFU/mL

drug_concentration.description: If drug used in growth medium, please give the concentration (mg/L or molarity)
